topic: generate a quiz on deep learning

questions.question: What is Deep Learning?
options: A) A type of Machine Learning
B) A type of Data Visualization
C) A type of Database
D) A type of Operating System
questions.explanation: Deep Learning is a subset of Machine Learning that uses neural networks.

questions.question: What is a Neural Network?
options: A) A type of Algorithm
B) A type of Data Structure
C) A computer system modeled after the human brain
D) A type of Database
questions.explanation: A Neural Network is a computer system inspired by the structure and function of the human brain.

questions.question: What is a Deep Learning Framework?
options: A) A programming language
B) A type of Database
C) A set of tools and libraries for building Deep Learning models
D) A type of Operating System
questions.explanation: A Deep Learning Framework is a collection of tools and libraries used for building and training Deep Learning models.

questions.question: What is Backpropagation?
options: A) A type of Optimization Algorithm
B) A type of Data Preprocessing technique
C) A type of Neural Network Training method
D) A type of Model Evaluation metric
questions.explanation: Backpropagation is a widely used algorithm for training Neural Networks.

questions.question: What is Overfitting?
options: A) When a model is too simple to fit the data
B) When a model is too complex to fit the data
C) When a model is performing well on training data
D) When a model is performing poorly on training data
questions.explanation: Overfitting occurs when a model is too complex and fits the training data too closely.
